title: McCarthy Tétrault Appoints Eva Bellissimo to Lead Business Law Group, Tom Sutton to Lead Litigation Group
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Appoints Eva Bellissimo to Lead Business Law Group, Tom Sutton to Lead Litigation Group
We are pleased to announce the appointments of Eva Bellissimo as National Practice Group Leader, Business Law, and Tom Sutton as National Practice Group Leader, Litigation , effective immediately.
Eva brings to the firm’s Business Law practice a strong reputation for advancing strategic and entrepreneurial solutions in transactions. Tom’s passionate advocacy on behalf of clients will ensure the firm’s Litigation practice continues its nation-leading reputation for delivering results.
As Co-leader of the firm’s market-leading Global Metals & Mining Group , Eva has led many complex mining transactions both domestically and internationally. With more than 20 years of experience, she is well-versed in the unique challenges that arise in multijurisdictional transactions, and is passionate about helping clients capitalize on opportunities, whether in Canada or abroad.
“Now more than ever in this evolving business landscape, clients need strategic and innovative solutions,” Eva said. “With unparalleled legal expertise, our team of commercially minded lawyers remains committed to helping clients manage risk and solve their most complex challenges.”
Tom, who previously led the firm's Litigation and Disputes Resolution Practice in Toronto as Practice Lead, has accumulated over 25 years of experience at the firm. Throughout his career, he has acted as lead counsel before all levels of court in Ontario, several other provincial superior courts, the Supreme Court of Canada, and numerous domestic and international arbitral tribunals. Known for his skill in managing intricate litigation, Tom is also acknowledged as a pioneer in using technology to offer innovative client solutions like e-Discovery and virtual arbitration.
"Throughout our distinguished history as a firm, we have consistently excelled in handling litigation of all kinds, even the most intricate cases, across all court levels," Tom stated. "We have always been and will remain at the forefront with client-centered strategies that safeguard our clients' interests."
“Both Eva and Tom have demonstrated extensive knowledge and a true understanding of the business realities across the regions within which our clients operate,” said Sunil Kapur , CEO-Elect of McCarthy Tétrault.
“In their respective Practice Group Leader roles, they will oversee diverse and talented teams across the country, who handle complex and high-profile transactions and disputes for clients in various industries, both domestically and internationally. They are respected leaders and mentors who will guide their teams with strategic direction, client service, talent attraction and retention and professional growth.”

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
